import pandas as pd
from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression

def task_func(df, target):
    X = df.drop(columns=[target])  # Independent variables (features)
    y = df[target]  # Dependent variable (label)

    model = LinearRegression()
    model.fit(X, y)

    score = model.score(X, y)  # R-squared score

    return (score, model)
